MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ISAIAH D. HUGHES' MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT

Appearances: Jaclyn Joyce of the Zakay Law Group (619.255.9047) for plaintiff and moving party; Jeff Gillette of Messner Reeves, LLP (949.612.918) for defendants and responding party.

Discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class action and PAGA settlement" is granted.
